content.tagline: Precision Cutting and Fabrication for Marine Industry
content.about:
Advanced Waterjet Solutions is Fort Lauderdale's premier provider of precision waterjet and laser cutting services for the marine industry and beyond. Located at 3309 SW 11th Ave in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, we bring cutting-edge technology and over 20 years of expertise to every custom metal fabrication project we take on. Whether you're a boat builder in Broward County or a yacht owner docked along the Intracoastal, we deliver the accuracy and craftsmanship your project demands.

Our facility specializes in precision waterjet cutting, laser cutting, and custom metal fabrication — services that require tight tolerances and consistent quality from start to finish. We work with a wide range of metals and materials, handling everything from structural welding and component fabrication to intricate custom parts for marine applications. Our welding and fabrication work meets the demands of a saltwater environment, where quality isn't optional — it's essential.

We serve boat builders, yacht manufacturers, marine repair shops, and vessel owners throughout South Florida, including Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties — anywhere within about 60 miles of our Fort Lauderdale shop. Our clients come to us because they need fast turnaround times without sacrificing precision. From initial design consultation to final fabrication, we treat every project with the same level of care, whether it's a one-off custom part or a production run for a South Florida boatyard.
content.seoTitle: Advanced Waterjet Solutions | Welding & Fabrication Fort Lauderdale, FL
content.seoDescription: Custom welding & fabrication for marine industry in Fort Lauderdale, FL. Serving South Florida with precision and fast turnaround. Call us today.
seoKeywords: custom metal fabrication Fort Lauderdale FL

serviceDescriptions.Welding & Fabrication: Advanced Waterjet Solutions provides precision welding and custom metal fabrication services tailored to the demands of marine construction and repair. From structural welds and custom brackets to intricate component fabrication, our team works with a variety of metals to deliver parts built for durability and exact fit. Every fabrication project is held to tight tolerances to ensure reliable performance in demanding saltwater environments.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Advanced Waterjet Solutions is based in Fort Lauderdale, FL and serves marine clients throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Custom stainless steel bracket fabrication for marine hardware installation
Structural welding repairs on aluminum and steel boat frames
Precision waterjet-cut deck plates and hatches for yacht builds
Custom fabricated railings and handrails for commercial and recreational vessels
Replacement parts fabrication for aging or discontinued marine components
Welded fuel tank fabrication and repair for inboard and outboard vessels
Custom metal component production for boatyard production runs
